summary: Comprehensive backend API testing for Customer App and Delivery Partner App. All 46 tests pass. Fixed 2 MongoDB ObjectId serialization bugs in cart update and order tracking endpoints.

bugs_fixed.issue: 500 Internal Server Error - MongoDB ObjectId not serializable
bugs_fixed.fix: Added cart.pop('_id', None) before returning response

bugs_fixed.issue: 500 Internal Server Error - nested delivery_address contained _id
bugs_fixed.fix: Added order['delivery_address'].pop('_id', None) and also fixed order placement to not store _id in delivery_address

critical_code_review_comments: MongoDB ObjectId serialization: Always exclude _id when returning data from MongoDB. Use {'_id': 0} in find queries and pop('_id', None) for nested objects.
OTP is MOCKED - returned in API response for testing. Remove in production.
seed_data_creation: Test orders created during testing with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Customer App and Delivery Partner App APIs are working correctly. Full test coverage includes: OTP auth (MOCKED), store discovery (food/grocery/laundry modules), cart management, address CRUD, order placement & tracking, profile management, delivery partner available/assigned deliveries, earnings (today/week/month/all), location updates, accept/reject deliveries, status updates.

mocked_apis.OTP_authentication: OTP is returned in send-otp API response for testing purposes. In production, OTP should be sent via SMS gateway.
